{{CargoRelic
|name=Last Breath
|class_id=21249
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This test tube, storing Edison's last breath, is now housed in the Ford Museum. Ford believed that the last breath exhaled by a person contained the soul leaving the body. ThroughThis form, he could keep his friend in the world, expressing respect and remembrance for Edison. It also became a symbol of the friendship between the two great inventors and is one of the most precious collections in the Ford Museum.
|fame=72
|art=40
|fth=36
|civ=43
|tech=52
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
